name: Frontier State Bank
description_short: Frontier State Bank is an FDIC-insured Oklahoma City bank serving the region for over 50 years, offering checking, savings, CDs, lending, and business banking solutions.
description_long: Frontier State Bank has been serving the Oklahoma City community for more than 50 years as a traditional full-service bank. Located at 5100 South I-35 Service Road, the bank operates with FDIC insurance backing, providing depositors with federal protection up to applicable limits. The institution maintains a physical presence with a main lobby and drive-through locations, complemented by modern digital banking capabilities. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of retail and business banking services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), personal and commercial lending, credit cards (VISA line), online banking, and treasury services for business clients. Their lending solutions span multiple use cases, and they specifically promote competitive CD rates as a savings vehicle. The bank provides both consumer and business checking accounts tailored to different customer needs. Frontier State Bank distinguishes itself through its long-standing local presence and community focus in Oklahoma City, combined with FDIC insurance protection and modernized online banking platform. The bank emphasizes improved digital features and performance while maintaining traditional in-person service channels. Their treasury services indicate capability for more sophisticated business cash management needs. The bank operates as a traditional brick-and-mortar institution with extended hours (9am-5pm weekdays, 9am-6pm Fridays, 9am-12pm Saturdays for drive-through). However, the website provides limited detailed information about specific product terms, rates, fees, or competitive advantages beyond their longevity and basic service categories. Prospective customers would need direct contact (405-672-7831) to compare rates and terms against other regional and national options.
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with federal backing up to applicable limits
Over 50 years of established operations serving Oklahoma City community
Extended drive-through hours (8am-6pm weekdays, 9am-12pm Saturday) for convenience
New and improved online banking platform with better features and performance
Comprehensive lending solutions including personal and commercial options
Competitive CD rates promoted as a primary savings product
Treasury and cash management services available for business clients
cons: Limited transparency on website regarding specific rates, terms, and fee structures
Single physical location in Oklahoma City limits geographic accessibility
No information provided about loan approval criteria or lending timelines
Website lacks detail on credit card rewards, APR ranges, or product comparisons
Minimal information about business banking features and service capabilities

contact.address: 5100 S I 35 Service Rd, Oklahoma City, OK 73129

best_for: Oklahoma City residents seeking local bank relationship with FDIC protection
Small to mid-sized businesses needing commercial checking and treasury services
Savers looking for competitive CD rates and traditional banking services
Customers preferring in-person banking with extended drive-through hours
diagnosis: Frontier State Bank is best for Oklahoma City-area residents and small-to-mid-sized businesses seeking a traditional community bank with FDIC protection, extended hours, and digital banking access. The primary caveat is that the website lacks detailed rate and fee information, requiring direct contact with the bank to make informed product comparisons.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 5100 S I 35 Service Rd, Oklahoma City, OK 73129
